home.hero_subtitle: Himq builds a personal learning path designed exactly for you — then teaches it, lesson by lesson.
home.cta_subtitle: Join students across Armenia building skills that actually matter.
home.learn_title: What do you want to learn?
home.learn_subtitle: Any topic, any level. Our AI builds a personalized 5-lesson course in seconds.
home.learn_hint: ...and any other topic you can think of.
home.ai_subtitle: May isn't a chatbot — it's a structured personal teacher that adapts to you.
home.ai_step1_desc: Tell May what you want to learn and your level. No forms.
home.ai_step2_desc: A short discovery chat so May understands exactly what you need.
home.ai_step3_desc: A personalized 5-lesson roadmap generated just for you.
home.ai_step4_desc: Each lesson is a focused conversation. Mark complete, unlock the next.
home.events_subtitle: Competitions, scholarships, internships, workshops — all verified and curated.
home.events_note: Find an opportunity you like and click Prepare Me — May builds a course to help you qualify.
home.rewards_subtitle: Every lesson and real-world event earns you points.
home.rewards_note: XP resets each term — stay consistent to stay on top.
home.rewards_p1_desc: Finish a lesson in your AI course to earn +50 XP.
home.rewards_p2_desc: Owners verify attendance — earn XP for real participation.
home.rewards_p3_desc: Top students each term get recognition and real rewards.
home.about_title: Built for Armenian students who are serious about growth.
home.about_body: We built Himq because Armenian students deserve world-class learning tools — not just access to content, but a real teacher that adapts to them and connects them to local opportunities.
home.banner_title: Every lesson is a step toward something real.
home.feature_ai_desc: Tell us what you want to learn. Our AI builds a 5-lesson plan and teaches you interactively.
home.feature_xp_desc: Attend real events and competitions in Armenia to earn XP and climb the leaderboard.
home.feature_opp_desc: Discover scholarships, competitions, internships, and grants — all in one place.
home.how_it_works_subtitle: From zero to learning in under 60 seconds.
home.step1_desc: Tell us what you want to learn — Python, marketing, English, anything.
home.step2_desc: Our AI creates a 5-lesson personalized path in seconds.
home.step3_desc: Chat through each lesson, complete them, and climb the leaderboard.

footer.tagline: AI-powered learning paths and real Armenian opportunities — all in one place.
